name: routesnap
description: Chrome extension to download cycling routes as GPX files
author: sbeleuz

scripts.dev: npm run build && echo 'Extension built! Load dist/ folder in chrome://extensions/ with Developer mode enabled'
scripts.watch: echo 'Watch mode: Manually run "npm run build" after changes, then reload in Chrome'
scripts.lint: echo 'Add ESLint or similar for linting'
